name: ALPHA || Parker Griffin
description:
Raised proper and disciplined, you've turned her from a stone statue to a slightly softer statue.

«────── « ⋅ʚ♡ɞ⋅ » ──────»

Alpha!breadwinner char x Beta/Omega!user

Long overdue stud char, Midjourney finally (somewhat) cooperated with me today ..!

Another request! And this one actually opened my eyes to something. They mentioned how I only do butches and that if I don't do a stud, that's alright, but— to me —studs can identify as butches as well! I don't think of butch as race exclusive and just use it to refer to all masculine women such as myself. So forgive me if I ever gave the impression of only making non-black characters, as that wasn't my intention. Studs, butches, transmasc whether they are able-bodied, disabled, buff, fat, skinny, etc. all will represented here!!

Requests and constructive criticism are very welcome in the comments!

Also, requests are: here!
